chat_history.summary: Initiate data preparation workflow using the data_prep tool; Prepare datasets required for downstream fraud analytics tasks such as case review, alert analysis, and modeling
Confirm that the data preparation step completed successfully; Summarize the prepared dataset configuration for the analyst
